summary: Completed comprehensive testing of mobile-friendly header refactoring and responsive design features. All key functionality working correctly including mobile layout, modal responsiveness, trap filtering, and profile generation.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Header shows 'Générateur REMC' title at top on both desktop and mobile
Options and Generate buttons appear below title with proper spacing
Mobile view (375px) displays correctly with compact responsive layout
Modal is scrollable and fits properly on mobile screen (340px width)
Selected options appear as small badges (H, C1, trap icon) next to buttons
Profile generation works correctly on mobile and desktop
Trap filtering works - C1 level shows 6 options, C3 level shows 5 different options
Traps are properly filtered to only show options valid for selected competency level
Desktop view displays profile grid correctly with 4+8 column layout
Modal uses ScrollArea component for mobile scrolling
Responsive design adapts properly between desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px)
Badge display system works for gender (H/F), level (C1-C4), and trap indicators
Profile generation creates realistic student profiles with proper competency evaluation
Trap display section appears when trap is selected and profile is generated
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding aria-describedby attribute to DialogContent component for better accessibility compliance. This is a minor accessibility improvement.
